text.title: token-organization Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for token-organization as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Tailwind config and CSS custom properties maintained separately from the JSON token source-of-truth.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Manual synchronization drifts silently; a pipeline from JSON → Tailwind config → CSS variables must be automated or the three will diverge.

failure-mode.description: Component tokens created for every component property variation without governance review.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Ungoverned component tokens explode; `button.primary.padding.left.hover.large` is a canonical failure mode that signals the semantic layer was bypassed.
